amenities.description: Users may park their own vehicles at this facility.

The facility has a roof over the vehicles.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.

drive_up.text: Scan your QR Code at the box with the red flashing lights. Hold the QR code about 2 inches away from the reader and the gate will open.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
When exiting, scan your QR Code again at the box with the red flashing lights.
The gate will open and you're free to go!

common.title: 321 S Wabash Ave. (55 E Jackson Blvd)
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location on South Wabash Avenue. The entrance to this facility is located at 321 S Wabash Avenue. It is on the left-hand side of Wabash (one-way), just past the Jackson and Wabash intersection. The entrance is immediately after the Starbucks and Potbelly. This garage is operated by Legacy Parking.

visual_flags.title: Shortest Walk
visual_flags.description: This facility is the closest to the search location

restrictions: Garage attendants may ask you to valet your vehicle with them once garage reaches maximum occupancy.

amenities.description: A valet will park the users vehicle at this facility.
The facility has a roof over the vehicles.
The facility has staff on-site for assistance and questions.
The facility is wheelchair accessible.

drive_up.text: Show the valet your SpotHero Parking Pass, either printed or on a mobile device. Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so will result in a ticket or tow.
The valet will hand you a ticket and will park your car. You must have this ticket in order to exit.
When you're ready to go, show the valet your ticket and your car will be retrieved.

common.title: 430 S Clark St. - Valet Garage
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 430 S Clark St. This is the 430 S Clark St. garage, operated by Modern Parking Services. It is located on the West/Right-hand side of S Clark St. (a one-way street) between W Van Buren St. and W Congress Pkwy.

visual_flags.title: Best Value
visual_flags.description: This facility has the best combination of rating reviews and price

restrictions: During times of high volume, you may have to leave your keys with the valet.
Height Restriction: 6' 10"

If you have an oversized vehicle (including a minivan), a $10 fee will be charged onsite if you did not include your vehicle type when booking the reservation (and thus already be charged the $10 oversize fee)
Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so will result in a ticket or tow.

drive_up.text: Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so will result in the gate not lifting automatically.

When entering, pull up to the gate and the gate will open after reading your license plate. If the gate does not open after a few seconds, please scan your parking pass to enter the facility using the scanner.

When exiting, pull up to the gate and the gate will open after reading your license plate. If the gate does not open after a few seconds, please scan your parking pass to exit the facility using the scanner.

common.title: 64 W Van Buren St. - South Loop Garage
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 64 W Van Buren St. This is the South Loop Self Park garage, operated by InterPark. It is located on the north/right-hand side of W Van Buren St. (a one-way street) between S Federal St. and S Clark St. Please note that this entrance closes at 8pm on weekdays and is closed on weekends, but you can also enter this garage 24/7 at its other entrance around the corner, 318 S Federal St.

visual_flags.title: Highest Rated
visual_flags.description: This facility has been rated the highest recently

restrictions: Height Restriction: 6' 10"

Please note: The garage is open 24/7. The Federal St entrance is always open, and the Van Buren entrance closes after 8pm on weekdays and is closed on weekends too. Separately, if you believe the garage appears inaccessible or full, please call InterPark customer service at 312-935-2960 to verify first.
Please wait 5 minutes after purchase before entering the parking facility. If you are updating your reservation times, please allow 15 minutes for updates to take effect.

drive_up.text:
Make sure your license plate matches the plate on your Parking Pass. Failure to do so will result in a ticket or tow.

Please note that you do NOT need to print a ticket at the pay & display box. Your license plate number on your SpotHero parking pass will be used to enforce your reservation.
You may park anywhere that doesn't say "Reserved".
Do not re-enter your license plate number onsite. We've got you covered!
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: 231 S Wabash Ave.
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location on South Wabash Avenue. This is the 231 S Wabash Ave. - Lot, operated by Premium Parking. It is located on the East/Left-hand side of S Wabash Ave. (a one-way street) between E Adams St. and E Jackson Blvd.
restrictions: Please note: reservation extensions for this location are currently not accepted on SpotHero. If you plan to stay after your pre-paid reservation times, please pay the facility directly.

Premium Parking's Terms and Conditions:
We accept no responsibility for loss or damage to vehicle or contents.
We do not take custody of vehicles but only rent space.
NOT TRANSFERABLE
You must Enter Your License Plate to enter this Facility! If your plate does not match your reservation you will not be able to Enter or Exit!

Users may enter and exit the facility more than one time.
The facility is heated during cold weather.

drive_up.text: Park anywhere on the 2nd or 3rd floor. Caution two-way ramp, drive slow, & honk your horn going up and down the ramp. Use stairs in the middle of the floor. Make sure you have correctly entered your license plate prior to leaving the vehicle.
If you have questions or need assistance you can reach out at  (773) 501-5168 or (312) 953-9770.
Simply leave when you're ready to go!

common.title: 710 S Wabash Avenue - Seventh Street Garage
common.navigation_tip:
The garage has restricted access, please read and follow instructions.  

DO NOT PARK IN CAR RENTAL SPOTS MARKED ‘SIXT’ 

Enter this garage at 710 S Wabash Ave. It is located on the west side of S Wabash Ave just south of E Balbo Dr. Check your email for your Spothero confirmation, open the booking, scroll down to ‘Things You Should Know’ and look for garage access codes, use the south door (door on the left when facing the building) to enter. Pull up to the keypad on the wall and enter the access code that is provided post-purchase
restrictions:
At times when garage is attended, the attendant will let you in and
ask for your ‘Rental ID’.
Check your booking email post purchase for access codes.
Height Restriction: 7' 4"

This facility is multilevel, but does not have an elevator. Please select a different facility if you have trouble managing inclines. Feel free to unload luggage in the loading zone in front of the building.
This location does not accept oversize vehicles. If your vehicle takes up more than a standard size parking space, your reservation will not be accepted.
Unlimited in & out is allowed for overnight parking.

common.title: 609 S State St.
common.navigation_tip: Enter this location at 609 S State St. This is a lot operated by Legacy Parking. The signage on site will say 609 S State St. It is located on the east side of S State St. between E Harrison St. and E Balbo Ave. You will also see signage for 651 S State- this is the same location.
restrictions: Height Restriction: 6' 4"
Standard sized vehicles only. Due to size constraints, this location is unable to accommodate minivans, midsize and large SUVs, pickup trucks, and passenger vans.
This location goes by both 651 S State St. and 609 S State St. You will see signage for both.
When inputting your license plate, please do not add any spaces, just include the letters and number as they appear on your license plate
You must park within your reservation time. Failure to do so will result in a ticket or tow.

common.title: 17 East Adams Street - Adams-Wabash Garage
common.navigation_tip:
Enter this location on Old Route 66. This is the Adams and Wabash garage operated by InterPark. There are 2 entrances for this facility, 17 E Adams St. and 210 S. Wabash.

*The 17 E. Adams St. entrance  is located on the south/left-hand side of E Adams St. (a one-way street) between S Wabash Ave. and S State St.            

*The 210 S. Wabash Ave. entrance is located on the west/right-hand side of S. Wabash St. (a one-way street) just south of the intersection of Wabash and Adams. This will be the first garage entrance you encounter once you go south through the intersection of Wabash/Adams.
restrictions: Height Restriction: 6' 10"
